sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30137" key="e)gkatadarqa/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκατα-δαρθάνω</orth>, <sense id="n30137.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sleep in</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.647f</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n30137.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">go to sleep over</tr_> a thing, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῷ διψῆν</foreign> ib. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">688f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
